g.text: I'm an AI Engineer who builds end-to-end AI systems — from raw data pipelines to deployed LLM-powered applications.
My work spans the full AI engineering stack: Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Multi-Agent
Workflows, and production deployment. I don’t just experiment in notebooks — I build, containerize, and ship systems that work.
Combining LangChain, Pinecone vector database, and Gemini/OpenAI APIs.
Sentiment analysis, NER, text classification, Q&A systems using BERT & Transformer models.
Object detection (YOLO, Faster R-CNN), face recognition, OCR, semantic segmentation.
Built with LangGraph — tool-calling and human-in-the-loop patterns.
Built with FastAPI — schema validation, error handling, and Swagger docs.
Services with Docker, deployed to Google Cloud Run and Railway.
Pipelines with LangSmith for tracing, token monitoring, and cost control.
